neutrality.auditor_independence: a neutral third party that assures any model or agent — not a payment network or model lab grading work it also profits from; a forecaster cannot score itself
neutrality.conflict_of_interest_policy: Phronesis does not transact, bind, or take the action it assures — it issues an auditable action boundary; the calling agent or human retains the action
neutrality.customer_influence_policy: no customer can buy a favorable action boundary

integrity_floor.no_fabrication: where a number is not earned, a defensible blank is shown — never a fabricated metric
integrity_floor.timestamp_discipline: the Mnemosyne ledger is the canonical record of what was known when
integrity_floor.untrusted_principal_context: client-supplied identity and mandate are consumed as input and never trusted for authorization — the authoritative principal is JWT-derived

live_invariants: MCP and REST co-equal at every endpoint, through one boundary publish gate
every Decision Asset carries attribution, timestamp, confidence, and audit
per-tenant isolation architecturally prevented at the boundary publish layer
prompt versioning is a reviewed code change, not runtime config
proof_of_decision: every audit_receipt is publicly verifiable — agents, regulators, and counterparties can independently confirm any Decision Asset's content and provenance

external_review.red_team: standing adversarial review of any consequential capability before it is wired
external_review.appeals: supersession + dispute path on any published Decision Asset
